name: TwinWorkshop
summary: Workshop a personal twin in 60 minutes. The platform performs the full workshop loop on itself, with the customer in the room: intake what they want to delegate, clarify the contract, design the agent live, validate against their test input, hand them the .py.
tagline: The full workshop loop, performed by the platform on itself, with the customer in the room.
egg_note: Stateless per workshop session — no shipped state.

args.description: I want an agent that answers prospect emails the way I would.
